page: Microsoft Azure E32s_v3 is an ESv3-family virtual machine configured with 32 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz, featuring 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The architecture is x86_64, supported by 35 MB of L3 cache, and includes hardware flags such as AVX, AVX-512, and AES. It is bundled with 524 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark data reveals a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, including stress-ng, Geekbench single-core, and single-threaded compression tests, consistently fall into the weak category. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels across stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU tests. Memory bandwidth for both small and large blocks, along with Passmark memory scores, also registers in the average tier.

Given its high memory density and average multi-threaded capabilities, the E32s_v3 is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require top-tier single-thread performance. It is well-suited for database operations, Redis caching layers, and static web serving, where it achieves average throughput. It can also handle moderate LLM inference tasks for small to medium models, though large-scale model inference is constrained by its hardware profile.
description: The Microsoft Azure E32s_v3 is an ESv3-family virtual machine designed for memory-intensive workloads. It features 32 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz with 16 physical cores. The instance includes 524 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. While single-core benchmarks for this x86_64 server fall into the lower tier, its multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently achieve average mid-tier ratings. This resource profile makes the E32s_v3 qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy applications that benefit from a high RAM-to-vCPU ratio without needing leading-edge single-threaded speed. It is highly suitable for database hosting, caching layers like Redis, static web serving, and moderate multi-threaded enterprise workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32s_v3 is an ESv3-family VM featuring 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 524 GB local storage. It delivers average multi-core and memory performance for database and caching workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32s_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 524 GB local storage, ideal for databases and caching.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a high RAM-to-vCPU ratio and local storage for database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 32 vCPUs and 16 physical cores
256.0 GB of system memory providing an 8 GB per vCPU ratio
524 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Average multi-core and memory bandwidth benchmark performance
Suited for database operations, Redis caching, and web serving
